claimText: University of Bristol uses a four-category system for AI use in assessments: Category 1 (prohibited - no AI use), Category 2 (minimal - spelling/grammar only, default), Category 3 (selective - certain tasks as specified), and Category 4 (integral - AI required for assessment).
normalizedValue: Four-category AI assessment system: prohibited, minimal, selective, integral

citation.citationTitle: Using artificial intelligence (AI) in assessments and for studying
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
